name: Prism: Create Scene From Preset
description: Creates a new scene file in the given entity/department/task using a preset file. Wraps core.entities.createSceneFromPreset(entity, fileName, department, task, comment).
python_code:
from os import PathLike
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode
from src.utils.prism_core import resolve_prism_core

class PrismCreateSceneFromPresetNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Prism: Create Scene From Preset"
    category = "DCCs"

    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/prism_icon.png"
        self.add_input("core", "any")
        self.add_input("entity", "dict")
        self.add_input("preset_file", "string", widget_type="file")
        self.add_input("department", "string", widget_type="text", default="fx")
        self.add_input("task", "string", widget_type="text", default="fire")
        self.add_input("comment", "string", widget_type="text", default="")
        self.add_output("success", "bool")
        self.add_output("scene_path", "string")

    async def execute(self, inputs):
        core = resolve_prism_core(inputs)
        entity = inputs.get('entity') or {}
        preset = inputs.get('preset_file') or ''
        dept = inputs.get('department') or ''
        task = inputs.get('task') or ''
        comment = inputs.get('comment') or ''
        if core is None:
            self.log_error("No PrismCore provided.")
            return {'success': False, 'scene_path': ''}
        try:
            result = core.entities.createSceneFromPreset(entity, preset, dept, task, comment=comment)
            scene_path = ''
            if isinstance(result, dict):
                scene_path = str(result.get('path') or result.get('scene_path') or result.get('filepath') or '')
            elif isinstance(result, (str, bytes, PathLike)):
                scene_path = str(result or '')
            self.log_success(f"Scene created from preset {preset}")
            await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
            return {'success': True, 'scene_path': scene_path}
        except Exception as e:
            self.log_error(f"createSceneFromPreset failed: {e}")
            return {'success': False, 'scene_path': ''}

def register_node():
    return PrismCreateSceneFromPresetNode
